user.title: Configure iHidro Romania
user.description: Enter your iHidro.ro (Hidroelectrica Romania) account credentials.

select_accounts.title: Select Accounts
select_accounts.description: Select the PODs (delivery points) you want to monitor. All accounts are selected by default.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate iHidro
reauth_confirm.description: Your iHidro session has expired. Please enter your credentials again.

configure_options.title: Energy Sensor (Optional)
configure_options.description: Optionally select an external energy sensor (e.g. Shelly EM, smart plug) for more accurate bill estimation and automatic meter reading submission. You can skip this step and configure it later in the integration options.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to iHidro server. Please check your internet connection.
error.no_accounts: No accounts (PODs) found for this user.
error.unknown: Unknown error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs.
error.energy_sensor_not_found: The selected energy sensor was not found in Home Assistant.
error.energy_sensor_wrong_class: The selected sensor is not an energy sensor (device_class must be 'energy').
error.energy_sensor_not_cumulative: The selected sensor is not a cumulative energy meter (state_class must be 'total_increasing' or 'total'). Select a sensor that reports total consumed kWh, not instantaneous power.
error.energy_sensor_wrong_unit: The selected sensor does not report energy in kWh or Wh. Sensors reporting W or kW (power) are not supported — select an energy (kWh) sensor instead.
error.energy_sensor_unavailable: The selected energy sensor is currently unavailable. Make sure the device is online and try again.
error.energy_sensor_not_numeric: The selected energy sensor has a non-numeric state. Make sure the sensor is working correctly.

abort.already_configured: This iHidro account is already configured.

init.title: iHidro Options
init.description: Configure options for the iHidro integration. Optionally select an external energy sensor (e.g. Shelly EM, smart plug) for more accurate bill estimation.

error.energy_sensor_not_found: The selected energy sensor was not found in Home Assistant.
error.energy_sensor_wrong_class: The selected sensor is not an energy sensor (device_class must be 'energy').
error.energy_sensor_not_cumulative: The selected sensor is not a cumulative energy meter (state_class must be 'total_increasing' or 'total'). Select a sensor that reports total consumed kWh, not instantaneous power.
error.energy_sensor_wrong_unit: The selected sensor does not report energy in kWh or Wh. Sensors reporting W or kW (power) are not supported — select an energy (kWh) sensor instead.
error.energy_sensor_unavailable: The selected energy sensor is currently unavailable. Make sure the device is online and try again.
error.energy_sensor_not_numeric: The selected energy sensor has a non-numeric state. Make sure the sensor is working correctly.

submit_meter_reading.name: Submit Meter Reading
submit_meter_reading.description: Submit electricity meter reading to Hidroelectrica for a specific POD. Uses the SubmitSelfMeterRead API endpoint with full metadata.

meter_reading.name: Meter Reading
meter_reading.description: The meter reading value to submit (in kWh)

reading_date.name: Reading Date
reading_date.description: Date when the reading was taken (format MM/DD/YYYY). Defaults to current date if not specified.
